steps.name: export-contract-and-dependencies
steps.summary: Confirmed export/capture contract in docs/ui-vocabulary/export-capture.md. PDF modes are current/all/poster; PNG scope is single term card/detail. Added html-to-image as the browser-only DOM capture dependency. npm run build and npm run lint passed; lint only reports existing shadcn Fast Refresh warnings.

steps.name: print-and-pdf-layout-hardening
steps.summary: Split PDF export into current and all modes with temporary state restore after print. Added print-only export summary, data-export-root/data-print-mode contract, and A4 summary styling. Verified npm run build, npm run lint, and Playwright smoke: current captured 35 / 257 terms for input category, all captured 257 / 257 terms, and the screen restored to the input filter after print.

steps.name: poster-view-for-filtered-category-exports
steps.summary: Added PosterView for compact category/filter exports, wired PDF split menu option '포스터로 저장', extended TermVisual with poster sizing, and added print CSS for data-export-poster. Verified npm run build, npm run lint, and Playwright smoke: input poster rendered 35 terms, commerce/billing poster rendered 7 terms, each with matching TermVisual mini renders, and screen mode restored after print.

steps.name: single-card-png-capture
steps.summary: Added browser-only PNG capture helper around html-to-image, with font readiness, white background, export-ignore filtering, and filename contract. Added data-export-card to cards, data-export-detail to detail sheets, and a detail-level PNG 저장 action. Verified npm run build, npm run lint, and Playwright smoke: text-field card/detail targets existed and produced ui-vocabulary-text-field-2026-06-26.png with a nonblank data:image/png URL.

steps.name: export-qa-and-documentation
steps.summary: Documented export usage, known limits, stable DOM contracts, and 2026-06-26 smoke results in docs/ui-vocabulary/export-capture.md. Checked off the export/capture polish plan DoD. Final verification passed: npm run build, npm run lint with existing shadcn warnings only, and mobile 390x844 header smoke with no horizontal overflow and visible search/PDF controls.
